top_signals.title: Oil Falls as Ships Cross Hormuz After US, Iran Reach Peace Deal
top_signals.summary: Oil fell and gasoline sank after the US and Iran agreed to settle a months-long conflict that triggered the biggest supply disruption in history, and some vessels were seen making their first crossings of the Strait of Hormuz since the war began.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fed’s Warsh Rocks Bond Market in Debut, Sparks Surge in Rate-Hike Bets
top_signals.summary: Traders piled into betting on interest-rate hikes as soon as next month after Kevin Warsh used his debut press conference as Federal Reserve chairman to make clear the central bank won’t tolerate high inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Fed officials tilt towards rate rise as Warsh era begins
top_signals.summary: US government bonds drop after central bank vows to tame jolt of inflation triggered by Iran war
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Army’s ‘Tropic Lightning’ Division ponders transformation lessons from Philippine war games
top_signals.summary: Because of HIMARS, Maj. Gen. Bartholomees pointed out his “division artillery is really what transformed the most.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Intel Shares Soar After Trump Says It Struck Apple Chip Deal
top_signals.summary: Intel Corp.’s stock surged more than 9% in premarket trading Thursday after US President Donald Trump said the chipmaker will work alongside Apple Inc. to design and produce semiconductors domestically.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: East Asian Refiners Eye Fuel Sales Boost Before Hormuz Reopen
top_signals.summary: Refineries in East Asia are starting to ramp up fuel exports after months of holding back and prioritizing local sales, in what appears to be an attempt to front-run the market before the Strait of Hormuz reopens.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Goldman’s Kaplan Says Fed May Hike by Fall, Sees Risk of More - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Goldman’s Kaplan Says Fed May Hike by Fall, Sees Risk of More  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Defense contractors would be barred from buying back their stock in bill approved by Senate panel
top_signals.summary: A bill the Senate Armed Services Committee approved would prevent defense contractors from buying back their stock without Pentagon approval.
